enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Showkali?

The song Showkali conveys a lively and energetic vibe, celebrating the joy of life and dance.

How does Showkali fit into the plot of Achcham Yenbathu Madamaiyada?

This song is a vibrant dance number that reflects the carefree spirit of the characters in the movie.

Who are the singers of Showkali?

The song features the voices of Aditya Rao, Dinesh Kanakaratnam, and Sri Raskol.

Who is the music director for Showkali?

The music director for this song is currently unknown.

When was Showkali released?

Showkali was released on June 17, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Showkali, the characters of Achcham Yenbathu Madamaiyada express their exuberance through dance and music, embodying a carefree and energetic spirit. The song's upbeat tempo and lively lyrics evoke feelings of joy and celebration, making it a perfect anthem for parties. It captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the thrill of living in the moment. Overall, Showkali is a vibrant celebration of life that resonates with anyone looking to enjoy the rhythm of their surroundings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Showkali from Achcham Yenbathu Madamaiyada is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and energy. Featuring a unique collaboration between talented singers Aditya Rao, Dinesh Kanakaratnam, and Sri Raskol, this track is sure to get you moving. With its infectious beats and catchy lyrics, Showkali is a must-listen for anyone looking to elevate their mood!
stanzaMeanings: The show is on, and it's not stopping.
We don't need the show; there's nothing special about it.
The show is happening, and it's not going to change anything.
This is the show, the show, the show, the show, the show, the show, the show.
What is this? Going back and forth, showing off the show, all the seeds are scattered, showing off the show is a celebration.
Our wings are the bikes; they are the first need in this world.
Am I going to jump and fly?
Will I forget my worries?
Just hold my hand; a bike is enough for me.
I don't need to forget; my bike is enough to go far, just enough, just enough.
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, what can I say? I can't finish it for you.
When the vehicle moves, what do you see in your dreams?
When you look at your horoscope, the vehicle is your protection; it shouldn't go behind you; it's your need.
What is this? Going back and forth, showing off the show, all the seeds are scattered, showing off the show is a celebration.
Our wings are the bikes; they are the show; we show off the show in the middle of the crowd.
Girls who join the show are like chickens that cluck.
Talk like a king, walk with the queen, and hold on tight.
Yeah, yeah, yeah, chicks, we don’t care; the bike is the game.
You walk gracefully; your beauty is not just for looks; your enchanting gaze doesn’t let the boys sleep.
Slowly, if you look at the curves, it will fall; the new beauty is now a game, your charm is captivating.
In many ways, once again, stand in front of you and shake it off.
I am stuck in your serious touch; I am stuck in your touch, and I am lying down.
This is the show, the show, the show, the show, the show, the show, the show.
What is this? Going back and forth, showing off the show, all the seeds are scattered, showing off the show is a celebration.
Hey, hey, hey, I am the lion of the show; I am the one who drives the vehicle; what am I doing? Can I take a break?
